seed_data_creation: Created test contracts with local_driver_allowance and max_km_included fields, created test invoices with manual trip entries during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 7 features are fully functional. Key features tested: 1) Contract Vehicle Rate Cards now have 'Driver Allowance/Day' field under Local Packages section - visible in Add Vehicle Rate Card modal. 2) Fixed Routes have 'Max KM' field next to From/To locations. 3) Billing allows creating invoices WITHOUT duty slips using Manual Trip Entries - when 'Enable itemized manual pricing' is checked, a new 'MANUAL TRIP ENTRIES' section appears with 'Add Trip' button. Each trip entry has Date, Passenger Name, Pickup Location, Drop-off Location, KM, Description/Notes, and Amount fields. Manual Trips Total is calculated and displayed. Invoice can be generated with only manual trip entries (no duty slips required). Traditional invoice generation with duty slips still works.

contract_driver_allowance_field.location: Contract Management > Create Contract > Add Vehicle Category modal

fixed_routes_max_km_field.location: Contract Management > Create Contract > Fixed Routes section

billing_manual_trip_entries.description: For trips where duty slips weren't signed or recorded. Add trip details manually for billing.

existing_invoice_generation.description: Traditional invoice generation with duty slips
